title: CBP - Hazelwood 2
notes:
To dose the CHW and LTHW

**chem in unit**

Remove and return empty drums to unit

Via fitted dosing pot

3 x Hy-Closehib-MN (12.5kg) - Closed System Corrosion Inhibitor - blend of Nitrite, Azole, Molybdate corrosion inhibitors. Target >300mg/l as MoO4. Supplied in 12.5kg(11.5L) drums
- Dose the LTHW - to target 300-600 as MoO4

1 x Hy-Bio-TRI - Triazine/Formaldehyde broad spectrum biocide. Shot dose 30-500 mg/L Broad pH Range (0.05% system volume).
- 2.5 litres into LTHW
- 3 litres into CHW.

1 x Hy-Inhib-YEL - Benzotriazole Supplementary Yellow metal (copper/brass) inhibitor. High Concentrate. Closed systems 75-140ppm dose rate. Cooling Towers refer to data sheet.
- Dose 400ml into CHW
